title: DISTINCT: movies that have at least one showtime
prompt_md: Which movies are actually scheduled? Return the **distinct** `movie_id` values that appear in the `showtimes` table — each one only once, even if a movie has several showtimes. Alias the column as `movie_id`.
hints: `SELECT DISTINCT` removes duplicate rows from the result.
Movie 1 (Dune) has two showtimes but should appear only once.
A movie with no showtimes simply never appears in this table.
